item.title: MMSearch-R1: Incentivizing LMMs to Search
item.author: kiming1206@gmail.com (Jinming Wu)
item.description: MMSearch-R1 is an e2e RL framework that enables LMMs to perform on-demand, multi-turn search with real-world multimodal search tools. MMSearch-R1-7B model outperforms same-size traditional RAG baselines and cuts search calls by over 30%.

item.title: LLaVA-Video: Video Instruction Tuning With Synthetic Data
item.author: kiming1206@gmail.com (Jinming Wu)
item.description: LLaVA-Video series models are Video-LLMs fully trained on our high-quality synthetic dataset, LLaVA-Video-178K, which comprises 178K video captions and 1.15M video QAs. Our models demonstrate strong performance across 10+ video understanding tasks.

item.title: MDR: Model-Specific Demonstration Retrieval at Inference Time for In-Context Learning
item.author: kiming1206@gmail.com (Jinming Wu)
item.description: MDR proposed a simple and effective metric to measure the preference of different LLMs for demonstrations and leveraged this metric to improve demonstration retrieval frameworks at inference stage.
